allow: Bash(# Test pagination with limit curl -s ""http://localhost:5000/api/prds?limit=2"")
Bash(# Verify structure endpoint still works curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/prds/5d7d72f8-ffa3-4093-aa08-76d33fb6dd3d/structure)
Bash(# Check the full AI settings to understand the model resolution curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai)

Bash(# Set development tier models explicitly curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""development"", ""tierModels"": { ""development"": { ""generatorModel"": ""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"": ""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"": ""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"" }, ""production"": { ""generatorModel"": ""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"" }, ""premium"": { ""generatorModel"": ""openai/gpt-5.2-pro"", ""reviewerModel"": ""google/gemini-3-pro-preview"", ""fallbackModel"": ""anthropic/claude-opus-4.6"" } } }'')

Bash(# Workaround: Set tier AND models explicitly together curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""development"", ""generatorModel"": ""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"": ""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"": ""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"" }'')

Bash(# Switch to production tier curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""production"", ""generatorModel"": ""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"" }'')

Bash(# Switch to premium tier curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""premium"", ""generatorModel"": ""openai/gpt-5.2-pro"", ""reviewerModel"": ""google/gemini-3-pro-preview"", ""fallbackModel"": ""anthropic/claude-opus-4.6"" }'')

Bash(# Switch back to development tier curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""development"", ""generatorModel"": ""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"": ""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"": ""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"" }'')
Bash(# Quick test: Is the API key still working? curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai)

Bash(# Step 1: Set all tiers explicitly first curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""production"", ""generatorModel"": ""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"", ""tierModels"": { ""development"": { ""generatorModel"": ""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"": ""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"": ""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"" }, ""production"": { ""generatorModel"": ""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"" }, ""premium"": { ""generatorModel"": ""openai/gpt-5.2-pro"", ""reviewerModel"": ""google/gemini-3-pro-preview"", ""fallbackModel"": ""anthropic/claude-opus-4.6"" } } }'')

Bash(# Step 2: Now switch tier to ""development"" WITHOUT providing model fields \(the bug scenario\) curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""development""}'')

Bash(# Quick API key test curl -s -w ""\\nHTTP:%{http_code}"" -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/ai/generate-dual -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""userInput"":""Test: Erstelle eine kurze App-Beschreibung"",""mode"":""generate""}'' --max-time 120)

Bash(# Switch to production - just tier, models should be preserved now thanks to fix curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""production""}'')
Bash(# Switch to premium tier curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""premium""}'')
Bash(# Switch to development tier for I1 retry curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""development""}'')
Bash(# Switch to production for edge case tests curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""production""}'')
Bash(# Make sure we''re on production tier curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""production""}'')

Bash(# Quick API key test curl -s -w ""\\nHTTP:%{http_code}"" -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/ai/generate-dual -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""userInput"":""Test"",""mode"":""generate""}'' --max-time 120)
Bash(# Check the raw key in the container - look for whitespace issues docker exec nexora-app printenv OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
Bash(# Verify Docker is running and test API key from within the container docker compose -f /c/Temp/Nexora/Nexora/docker-compose.yml ps)

Bash(# Restore all tier models curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""premium"", ""generatorModel"": ""openai/gpt-5.2-pro"", ""reviewerModel"": ""google/gemini-3-pro-preview"", ""fallbackModel"": ""anthropic/claude-opus-4.6"", ""tierModels"": { ""development"": { ""generatorModel"": ""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"": ""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"": ""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"" }, ""production"": { ""generatorModel"": ""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"" }, ""premium"": { ""generatorModel"": ""openai/gpt-5.2-pro"", ""reviewerModel"": ""google/gemini-3-pro-preview"", ""fallbackModel"": ""anthropic/claude-opus-4.6"" } } }'')
Bash(# Switch to production curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""production""}'')
Bash(# Get a list of existing PRDs for E3 review test curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/prds)
Bash(# Get an existing PRD with content for review test curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/prds)

Bash(# E4: Fallback test - set an invalid generator model, keep valid fallback # First save current settings curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai # Set invalid generator model but keep valid fallback curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""production"", ""generatorModel"": ""invalid/nonexistent-model-xyz"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"" }'')

Bash(# Reset production models after E4 test, then switch to dev for I2 curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"": ""development"", ""generatorModel"": ""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"": ""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"": ""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"", ""tierModels"": { ""production"": { ""generatorModel"": ""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"", ""reviewerModel"": ""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"", ""fallbackModel"": ""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1"" } } }'')

Bash(# Reset models and switch to dev for I2 curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""tier"":""development"",""generatorModel"":""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"",""reviewerModel"":""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"",""fallbackModel"":""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking""}'')

Bash(# Reset production models \(E4 had set invalid model\) and switch to dev curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:5000/api/settings/ai -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{ ""tier"":""development"", ""generatorModel"":""nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free"", ""reviewerModel"":""arcee-ai/trinity-large-preview:free"", ""fallbackModel"":""qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-thinking"", ""tierModels"":{""production"":{""generatorModel"":""google/gemini-3-flash-preview"",""reviewerModel"":""anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"",""fallbackModel"":""deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1""}} }'')
Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -s http://localhost:5000 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done':*)
